pages.text:
Leorg

GECRGK,

BY THE GRACE OF GOD,

CH GREAT BRITAIN,

IRELAND

AND THE BRITISH DOMINIONS BEYOND THE SEAS KING, DEFENDER OF

THE FAITH, EPEROR OF INDIA, 2C., R., &0., TO ALL AND SINGULAR

TO MOL THESE PRESENTS SHALL COME, GREETING!

whereas, ior the better treating oi ond arranging certain metters wrich ore now in discussion,

or which may come into

discussion, betveen Us, in respect of Cur Dominion of Canada, and our Good Friend the President of the French Republic relative to the conclusion of a Commercial Trade Asreement,

Convention dealing with the rights of nationals and with

Cormerce and Navigation, and a Convention regarding double taxation,

We have judged it expedient to invest fit persons

with Full Power to conduct the srid discussion on Our part in respect of Cur Dominion of Canada; Know ye, therefore, that не, reposing especial Trust and Confidence in the Wiscom,

Loyalty, Diligence, and Circumspection of Our Right Trusty and well-beloved Councillor Richerd Bedford Bennett, one of our

Counsel learned in the Law, Prime Minister, Secretary of state for

External Affairs and President of the Council of Our

Dominion of Canado;

and our Trusty and Well-beloved the

Honourable Charles Haslitt Cahan, one of Our Counsel learned in

the

one Law,

Secretary of State of our Dominion

of Coned?, have

named, made, constituted and appointed,

as We do

by these

Presents name, make, constitute end appoint them our undoubted

Commissioners, Procurators,

and Plenipotentiaries in respect of

Our Doninion of Canada for the purposes aforesaid; Giving to them, jointly or severally, all menner of Power and Authority to treat, adjust, and conclude with such Minister or Ministers as may be vested with similar Power and Authority on the part of Cur Good Friend

the President of the French Republic, any

Treeties, Conventions, or Agreements that may tend to the attainment of the above-mentioned end, and jointly or severally to sien for Us, and in our nome, in respect of cur Dominion 01

Canada, everything so agreed upon and concluded, and to do and transact all such

other matters es

may appertain

thereto, in as

ample manner

and form, and with equal force and efficacy, es We

Ourseives could do,

if personally present: Engaging

and

Promising, upon cur hoyal lord, that whetever things shall be so transacted

and

concluded

by our said

Cormissioners,

Procurators, end Plenipotentiaries ir respect ci Our Dominion of canada, shall, subject if necessary to our Ratification, be agreed to,

acknowledged end eccepted by Us, in the fullest

manner, end that we will never suffer, either in the whole or in part, any person whatsoever to infringe the same, or ect contrary thercto, as fer es it lies ir Our power.

In witness whereof We have caused Our Great Seal

to

effixed to these Preserts, wrich We have signed with Our koyel

Hand.

Given et Our Court of saint James,

the Eighteenth day

April in the Year of Our Lord, One

Thousand Nine Hundred

Thirty-three and in the Iwenty-third Year of

our Reign.
